title: CacheSettings
description: Cache settings configure cache lifetime for objects stored in the Fastly cache, overriding cache freshness information from HTTP response headers.

name.description: The name of the cache settings rule.

action.description: The action to take when the cache settings are applied.

ttl.description: The maximum time in seconds that the object should be cached.

stale_ttl.description: The maximum time in seconds that a stale object can be served.

cache_condition.description: The name of the condition that triggers these cache settings.
